Infrastructure binary does not render html/template; XSS code path is unreachable
Govulncheck determined that the vulnerable code isn't called
Govulncheck determined that the vulnerable code isn't called

node-cache is a pure-Go NodeLocal DNS caching daemon; the `golang.org/x/crypto/ssh` package is NOT compiled into the binary. `go list -deps` over the reproduced build graph (x/crypto v0.49.0, matching the shipped binary) shows only non-ssh x/crypto packages (cryptobyte, hkdf, chacha20poly1305, nacl, etc.); `go mod why golang.org/x/crypto/ssh` reports 'main module does not need package'. Vulnerable code not present.
Govulncheck determined that the vulnerable code isn't called
